evaluation.summary: The AI successfully captured the complex horizontal stripe pattern and the specific knit texture of the crochet-style cardigan. The silhouette is largely preserved, though the generated version appears slightly more tailored around the neck. The model and scene transition are excellent for a commercial catalog look.
